Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The RN advocates for tax reductions targeting working and middle class citizens, protectionist trade measures to shield French industry from foreign competition, and prioritisation of French citizens in economic benefits.
key_policies: Lower taxes for working and middle class French citizens
Protectionist measures to shield French industry from foreign competition
Prioritisation of French citizens over immigrants in jobs and social benefits
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: lower taxes on working and middle class French citizens while protecting French industry from foreign competition

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The RN supports nuclear energy and opposes rapid green transition policies, which they argue are harmful to French industry.
key_policies: Support for nuclear power as an energy source
Opposition to rapid green energy transitions
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: On energy we support nuclear power and reject rapid green transitions that harm industry.

Immigration.position_summary: The RN advocates for a dramatic reduction in immigration levels and the implementation of national preference policies that prioritize French citizens over immigrants in access to public resources and opportunities.
key_policies: Dramatically reduce overall immigration levels
Implement national preference policies prioritizing French citizens
Prioritize French citizens over immigrants in housing, jobs, and social benefits
Immigration.supporting_quote: prioritise French citizens in housing, jobs and social benefits over immigrants

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The RN takes a Eurosceptic stance, prioritising the reclamation of French national sovereignty from EU institutions in Brussels. They favour protectionist foreign economic policy, shielding French industry from foreign competition.
key_policies: Reclaiming French sovereignty from EU institutions in Brussels
Protecting French industry from foreign competition through trade protectionism
Reducing the influence of supranational EU governance over French domestic policy
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are Eurosceptic and want to reclaim French sovereignty from Brussels.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: La France Insoumise advocates for redistributive economic policies, including heavy taxation of the wealthy and corporations to finance expanded social programs and a universal basic income. The party also supports significant increases to the minimum wage and stronger protections for workers.
key_policies: Heavy taxation of wealthy individuals and large corporations
Introduction of a universal basic income
Significant increase to the minimum wage
Expansion of public services
Strengthening of workers' rights
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: tax the wealthy and large corporations heavily to fund a universal basic income and expanded public services

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: La France Insoumise supports a rapid energy transition away from fossil fuels and nuclear power, prioritizing renewable energy sources as the foundation of their environmental strategy.
key_policies: Rapid transition away from fossil fuels
Phase-out of nuclear power
Shift toward renewable energy sources
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: on climate we support rapid transition away from fossil fuels and nuclear power toward renewables

Immigration.position_summary: La France Insoumise supports an open immigration policy and advocates for the legalization of undocumented migrants currently residing in France.
key_policies: Support for open immigration
Regularisation of undocumented migrants
Immigration.supporting_quote: We support open immigration and regularisation of undocumented migrants.

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: LFI advocates for an independent French foreign policy with a critical stance toward NATO, while opposing EU austerity measures and seeking to renegotiate existing EU treaties.
key_policies: Critical of NATO and pursuit of an independent French foreign policy
Opposition to EU austerity policies
Renegotiation of EU treaties
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are critical of NATO and want an independent French foreign policy. We oppose EU austerity and want to renegotiate EU treaties.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste advocates for a robust public sector funded through progressive taxation, emphasizing increased taxes on high earners while shielding the middle class from additional burden.
key_policies: Raise taxes on wealthy individuals
Protect the middle class from tax increases
Invest in strong public services including healthcare, education, and transport
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: We want to raise taxes on the wealthy while protecting the middle class.

Healthcare.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste supports a publicly funded healthcare system backed by significant government investment as part of a broader commitment to strong public services.
key_policies: Investment in public healthcare
Strong welfare state to support healthcare provision
Robust public services including healthcare
Healthcare.supporting_quote: strong welfare state with investment in public healthcare

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste supports transitioning to a green economy through investment in renewable energy, while ensuring protections for workers whose industries are affected by the transition.
key_policies: Support for the green transition
Investment in renewable energy
Worker protection programmes for those in affected industries
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: we support the green transition with investment in renewables while protecting workers in affected industries

Immigration.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste supports a managed approach to immigration, coupled with strong programmes to facilitate the integration of immigrants into society.
key_policies: Managed immigration system
Strong integration programmes for immigrants
Immigration.supporting_quote: managed immigration with strong integration programmes

Education.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste supports a strong public education system backed by government investment, viewing it as a core component of the welfare state.
key_policies: Investment in public education
Strong public services including education
Welfare state support for education funding
Education.supporting_quote: investment in public healthcare and education

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The Parti Socialiste supports continued EU membership and engagement in international cooperation, though the platform provides limited detail on specific foreign policy positions.
key_policies: Support for EU membership
Commitment to international cooperation
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support EU membership and international cooperation.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Renaissance supports a liberal market economy with an emphasis on innovation, investment, and international competitiveness, including labour market and pension reforms.
key_policies: Liberal market economy with investment in innovation and technology
Reform of the pension system and labour market to improve competitiveness
Support for free trade and multilateral international institutions
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: liberal market economy with investment in innovation and technology

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: Renaissance supports a mixed energy approach combining nuclear power with investment in renewable energy sources, framed within a broader commitment to innovation and a liberal market economy.
key_policies: Support for nuclear power as part of the energy mix
Investment in renewable energy sources
Technology and innovation-driven approach to energy policy
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support nuclear power alongside investment in renewables.

Immigration.position_summary: Renaissance supports a balanced immigration approach that combines firm enforcement with humane treatment, emphasizing strong requirements for immigrants to integrate into French society.
key_policies: Firm enforcement of immigration rules
Humane treatment of immigrants
Strong integration requirements for immigrants
Immigration.supporting_quote: firm but humane approach with strong integration requirements

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Renaissance is strongly pro-EU and advocates for deeper European integration, particularly on defence, while supporting free trade and multilateral international institutions.
key_policies: Deeper European integration, especially on defence
Support for free trade agreements
Support for multilateral international institutions
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are strongly pro-EU and support deeper European integration especially on defence.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: Les Républicains advocates for a centre-right economic approach centred on tax reduction and cuts to public spending to drive growth, while preserving a basic social safety net. They also favour deregulation and free market principles for businesses.
key_policies: Lower taxes to stimulate economic growth
Reduced public spending
Free markets with reduced regulation on businesses
Maintaining a social safety net for the most vulnerable
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: lower taxes and reduced public spending to stimulate economic growth

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Immigration.position_summary: Les Républicains advocates for strict immigration control with enhanced enforcement at France's borders. Their approach emphasizes limiting immigration through stronger security measures.
key_policies: Strict control of immigration
Stronger border enforcement
Immigration.supporting_quote: strict control of immigration with stronger border enforcement

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: Les Républicains supports a strong French role within NATO and European defence structures, emphasizing France's active contribution to collective security.
key_policies: Support for NATO membership and commitments
Strengthening France's role in European defence
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support NATO and a strong French role in European defence.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: EELV advocates for a green economic transformation driven by heavy carbon taxation, with revenues directed toward funding a sustainable transition while protecting workers and vulnerable populations. They also support reducing working hours as part of reshaping the economy around ecological priorities.
key_policies: Introduce a heavy carbon tax to discourage fossil fuel use
Use carbon tax revenues to fund a green economic transition
Reduce working hours as part of economic transformation toward sustainability
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: tax carbon heavily and use the revenue to fund a green transition that protects workers and the most vulnerable

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: EELV places climate and ecology at the core of all policy, advocating for a full transition away from nuclear power toward renewables and strong carbon pricing measures. They support using carbon tax revenues to fund a green economic transition that protects workers and vulnerable populations.
key_policies: Phase out nuclear power and transition entirely to renewable energy by 2040
Implement a heavy carbon tax with revenues directed toward a green transition
Support strong EU integration focused on climate policy
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: tax carbon heavily and use the revenue to fund a green transition that protects workers and the most vulnerable

Immigration.position_summary: EELV supports an open and welcoming approach to immigration in France.
key_policies: Open immigration policy
Welcoming stance toward immigrants
Immigration.supporting_quote: We support open and welcoming immigration policy.

Education.position_summary: No position found in platform text

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: EELV supports deeper European Union integration, with a particular focus on coordinated EU-level action on climate and ecological policy.
key_policies: Support for strong EU integration
Prioritising EU-level climate policy coordination
Placing ecology at the centre of all policy, including foreign and EU affairs
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support strong EU integration especially on climate policy.
